--- SOURCE 1: Earthquake Warning System for Public Safety ---
URL: https://seismicai.com/earthquake-warning-public-safety/

SUMMARY:
Earthquakes pose a significant threat to transportation systems - airports, buses, trains and vehicles, disrupting operations and endangering both passengers

FULL CONTENT:
![logo main](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/WHITE_LOGOTYPE.png)
![logo dark](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/WHITE_LOGOTYPE.png)
![logo light](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/WHITE_LOGOTYPE.png)

![logo main](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/BLUE_LOGOTYPE.png)

## PUBLIC

## SAFETY

# Save Lives & Communities with an Earthquake Warning system

SeismicAI Earthquake Early Warning system (EEW) provides critical time, enabling people throughout the municipality - families at home, children in schools and businesspeople in commercial centers - to take cover and protect themselves, reducing risk for injuries and casualties. Our earthquake warning system also allows for preventative measures that mitigate damages to critical electricity, water and gas infrastructure throughout the municipality.

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/arrow-blue-down_1.png)

## PREPARE BETTER, RECOVER FASTER

Triggering vital preventive actions, SeismicAI earthquake warning system capabilities allows the organization to be better prepared for a seismic event. Moreover, it helps companies recover and get back-to-business faster.
SeismicAI’s high-precision earthquake early warning technology reduces false positives and ensures that complex, costly infrastructure adaptations or shutdowns occur only when needed. 
Furthermore, 24/7 monitoring and reporting pinpoint facility maintenance issues, including those generated by mild shaking.

## Mitigate Your Risk

Earthquakes and tsunamis can cause unimaginable destruction in schools, kindergartens, hospitals and other public buildings throughout the municipality, and also harm infrastructure, from transportation to gas, electricity and water facilities. Even mild events could generate losses of billions of dollars for the municipality. 
Many municipalities and regions have no earthquake warning solution, and existing systems offer a lower level of accuracy, often providing an alert when it’s too late.

## an earthquake warning system FOR ALL PUBLIC SECTORS

SeismicAI earthquake warning system automatically triggers emergency procedures and capabilities, tailored for a variety of public environments, to best prepare the affected zone before the destructive waves hit.

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-75.png)

###### [SMART CITY INTEGRATION](#smart-city-integration)

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-83.png)

###### [PUBLIC BUILDINGS](#public-buildings)

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-77.png)

###### [UTILITIES](#utilities)

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-78.png)

###### [FIRST RESPONDERS](#first-responders)

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-79.png)

###### [TRANSPORTATION](#transportation)

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/BLUE-DOWN-ARROW-ROUND.png)

## Smart City Integration

PUBLIC ANNOUNCEMENTS | UTILITIES PRESERVATION | INFRASTRUCTURE REHABILITATION

Our earthquake warning system seamlessly integrates with your business communication systems. It leverages IoT and cloud computing to provide alerts to all your team at unparalleled speed, accuracy and reliability, 24/7, for real-time responses to disasters and emergencies.

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-71.png)

###### IOT

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-59.png)

###### CLOUD

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-74.png)

###### SMART COMMUNICATIONS

## PUBLIC BUILDINGS

HOSPITALS | STADIUMS | EDUCATION FACILITIES | COMMUNITY CENTERS

Earthquakes can generate a trail of wreckage, routine disruption, financial losses and loss of life in municipal buildings. They can endanger intricate surgical procedures and valuable equipment in hospitals, injure vulnerable residents in nursing homes, and harm children in schools. SeismicAI earthquake warning system can mitigate damages by triggering preventive actions such as switching on safe mode for equipment, elevators and gates, reducing gas pressure, waste water and power shut-off, alerting children and inhabitants by SMS/audiovisual alert, and halting sensitive procedures.

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-62.png)

###### EQUIPMENT ON SAFE MODE

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-40.png)

###### EVACUATING PEOPLE

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-29.png)

###### AUDIOVISUAL ALERTS

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-53.png)

###### OPENING DOORS AND GATES

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-20.png)

###### STOPPING SENSITIVE OPERATIONS

## Transportation

AIR PORTS | SEA PORTS | TRAINS | BUSES

Earthquakes pose a significant threat to transportation systems - airports, buses, trains and vehicles, disrupting operations and endangering both passengers and workers. By providing an early alert, authorities can swiftly enact safety protocols, safeguarding both human lives and critical infrastructure. SeismicAI earthquake early warning system can trigger automatic braking mechanisms for trains, reroute air traffic, and activate alerts on road signs to prevent accidents and ensure the safety of passengers and workers.

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-39-1.png)

###### BRAKING MECHANISMS

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-50.png)

###### REROUTE AIR TRAFFIC

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-45.png)

###### ROAD SIGN ALERTS

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-51.png)

###### STOP BUSES AND EVACUATE PEOPLE

## UTILITIES

WASTE WATER | WATER PRESSURE PRESERVATION | POWER DISTRIBUTION | GAS DISTRIBUTION

Shaking can damage pipes, valves and pumping stations, causing hazardous chemical and water leakage, which can, among other, disrupt the supply of clean water or electricity. SeismicAI earthquake warning system can trigger preventives actions for power station safety, reduce gas pressure, hydrogen evaporation, substation protection, waste water shut-oﬀ, electricity and water mains shutoff. Finally, it can issue a post-event report to assess potential damages to pipes.

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-64.png)

###### SHUT DOWN SUBSTATION

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-17.png)

###### CONTROL WATER PRESSURE IN FIRE MAINS

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-47.png)

###### DUCK-COVER-HOLD ON

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/POST-EVENT-REPORT-1.svg)

###### POST EVENT REPORT

## First Responders

SEARCH AND RESCUE TEAMS | EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT AGENCIES | LAW ENFORCEMENT | GOVERNMENTAL AGENCIES

First responders face daunting challenges when providing critical assistance in earthquake-stricken areas. Seismic tremors not only disrupt ongoing efforts but also introduce a new layer of danger as structures become unstable, roadways may be compromised, and the overall chaos escalates. Here, SeismicAI’s earthquake warning system could be indispensable, offering rescue teams precious moments to strategically allocate resources, secure equipment and coordinate and start preparing rescue efforts. An early alert would minimize their exposure to immediate danger and implement more effective evacuation procedures, safeguarding their invaluable contributions to disaster relief efforts.

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-67.png)

###### ALLOCATE RESOURCES

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-52-1.png)

###### COORDINATE RESCUE EFFORTS

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-65.png)

###### SECURE EQUIPMENT

![](https://seismicai.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/icons-inner-pages-55.png)

###### TAKE COVER

## Maximizing Continuity and Back-to-Routine

SeismicAI’s high-resolution earthquake warning system ensures that complex utility adaptations or shutdowns occur only when needed. Furthermore, our system features a Shake Map, indicating the areas affected and the intensity of the impact, which accelerates safety assessments for the facility, supporting a swifter recovery for communities and public entities.

## Reducing environmental damages & financial liability

Earthquakes and tsunamis have a destructive effect on the environment, including toxic chemicals release, fires, floods, contamination and explosions, which, in turn, cause major health hazards for the general public. The environmental and health damage could also mean significant financial liability for municipalities recognized as the source of the hazard. Implementing an earthquake early warning could prevent a large part of these damages, and having a disaster management solution could build the municipalities’ public image and support.

### Tell me more

## ABOUT earthquake warning systems FOR MUNICIPALITIES

--- SOURCE 4: Public education about ShakeAlert® earthquake early ... ---
URL: https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/21548455.2023.2238872

SUMMARY:
by J Crayne · 2024 · Cited by 7 — More than 50 million people living on the U.S. West Coast could potentially experience damaging earthquakes (FEMA, 2017).



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------


--- SOURCE 5: How good is earthquake early warning? ---
URL: https://www.preventionweb.net/news/how-good-earthquake-early-warning

SUMMARY:
New research reveals that Earthquake Early Warning networks provide a timely warning of impending shaking more often than not.



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------


--- IMAGES ---

IMAGE 1:
URL: http://www.pnsn.org/EEWcartoon.jpg
DESCRIPTION: a diagram showing how earthquake early warning works with shaking and waves

IMAGE 2:
URL: https://earthquake.alaska.edu/sites/default/files/inline-images/How_does_early_warning_work_from_DGGS_factsheet.png
DESCRIPTION: A diagram illustrates how earthquake early warning systems detect seismic waves at a hypocenter, relay data to a central data center, and send early warnings to the public via a smartphone alert.

IMAGE 3:
URL: https://ohaz.uoregon.edu/files/2024/07/USA-Canada_EEW_FactSheet_May_2024_English_Page_2.jpg
DESCRIPTION: Various actions are illustrated around a central point, including stopping bridges, diverting planes, slowing trains, issuing public warnings, opening firehouses, closing valves, and stopping elevators, all triggered by earthquake early warning alerts.

IMAGE 4:
URL: http://hnhoyle.com.my/wp-content/uploads/2017/01/msig-earthquake-1.jpg
DESCRIPTION: An illustration showing a person holding a large sign labeled "Earthquake Awareness Guide," with a cracked ground and a toppled smartphone beneath, highlighting the importance of earthquake early warning and public safety measures.

IMAGE 5:
URL: https://i.pinimg.com/originals/2f/47/ff/2f47ffd83330d1875ae102b314c42cc8.jpg
DESCRIPTION: A visually instructive guide outlines essential earthquake safety tips, emphasizing actions such as dropping, covering, and holding on, along with specific guidance for different situations like driving, being in a wheelchair, or being in crowded places.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

enriched_points.expanded_content: Earthquake early warning systems provide critical alerts, allowing individuals to take protective actions, significantly reducing injuries and casualties during seismic events.
By issuing timely alerts, these systems facilitate proactive measures, enabling communities and organizations to prepare for impending earthquakes, thereby enhancing overall readiness.
Early warning systems foster community resilience by promoting awareness and preparedness, empowering citizens to respond effectively, and minimizing disruption to social and economic systems.
